
 
 
## *************particleSwarm-volume multiple5-mean: resultFilemultiple5*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'swarm_size': 400, 'c1': 1.5, 'c2': 2, 'w': 0.1, 'k': 80, 'p': 2, 'niter': 1000, 'ftol': 0.001, 'ftol_iter': 20}
Energy = 0.06339266368202788
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([348.86177659405865, -50.14458442592095, -62.297184289156455, -248.0310780539341, -77.63318107907611, 116.06904925631206, 119.36969571136379, 103.91745751673689, -25.989509945362833, -150.34744755830624, 194.7314403534672, 532.768368932787, -354.9389724192206, -206.06649426828335, -114.67773689157436, 27.165670122057637, 155.87235131677923, -25.43669145106836, -36.02116461315959, 158.03443433521136, 94.99185486304809, -252.16723078201719])
FinalState = FinalState.reshape(N, 3)
ax.scatter(FinalState[:,0], FinalState[:,1], FinalState[:,2], c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 240.2 minutes
 
 
## *************adam-volume multiple5-mean: resultFilemultiple5*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'learning_rate': 1, 'max_steps': 10000, 'ftol': 0.0001, 'tolerance_steps': 200}
Energy = 0.0439711172705338
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([485.4940502071518, -279.3659374299523, 0.5797387446586587, -403.7792323346116, -239.6126822646022, 0.5800051979715938, 230.53571488659492, 269.2679607474004, 29.452789499683934, -116.00838251220145, 22.412983959202684, 136.78803764755452, 68.26629614624709, -117.34850077477542, 495.41985537070263, 458.52494004975574, -49.180785465422986, -186.48843129894252, ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')

ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 27.33 minutes
